title: Storage Delight
description: Extra furniture for Farmer's Delight that makes your kitchen or any space look better.
body:
<center>

[![BisectHosting Sponsor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LTTvOp5L/images/46beaa714e795ddb2665e512aad075ca8ebc8fbd.png)](https://url-shortener.curseforge.com/OtRVJ)

</center>

<center>

![Storage Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LTTvOp5L/images/2b37126dcef53cff8488de1a496c013b90103075.png)

</center>

**Enhance your build experience with more furniture** designed to keep everything tidy. Transform your kitchen or any space while effortlessly organizing your essentials. [Check out the gallery to see more](https://modrinth.com/project/storage-delight/gallery).

## 🪵 Features
- Drawers
- Drawers with Doors
- Drawers with Books
- Small Drawers
- Bookshelves with Doors
- Glass Cabinets
- Cabinets with Glass Doors
- Single Door Cabinets

![Storage Delight Images](https://i.imgur.com/YX1AgoF.gif)

[![Saving for a laptop!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rlXSyLg/images/491c87c96cd602ec45774ce0b0cb9fe4d25ba074.png)](https://paypal.me/kevgelhorn)
